RootGrowth DigitalDigital infrastructure for serious businesses
The process

How we work.

From the first chat to a site that brings in work — four clear steps, no jargon.

Discovery

We learn about your business, your services, and the customers you want more of.

Design & Build

We craft a fast, mobile-first site built around turning visitors into calls and enquiries.

Launch

We put it live, connect your domain, and set up Google so local customers can find you.

Grow

We keep everything running and, on Growth and Premium, build your local visibility over time.

Investment & packages

Built to grow
your business.

Packages built for landscaping companies at every stage — from getting online to dominating your local area. Each one is an investment in more visibility, more leads, and more booked work. All prices in South African Rand (ZAR).

Our standards

Built right.
Built to last.

Every website we build for a landscaping company is tested, secured, and optimised before launch — so it loads fast, ranks well, and keeps bringing in work long after it goes live.

Good to know

Questions,
answered.

Straight answers to the things landscapers and home-service owners ask us most — so you know exactly what you're getting before you commit.

Still have a question? Talk to us →

Most projects go live within 1–3 weeks, depending on your package and how quickly we receive your content and photos. You'll have a clear timeline from day one.

Completely. Once your project is paid for, the website and domain belong to you — no lock-in, no holding your business hostage, ever.

Builds are a once-off investment (from R2,500), and ongoing care is handled through an optional monthly retainer. Everything is quoted clearly in ZAR before we begin — no surprises.

Yes. Our monthly retainers cover hosting, backups, security, and regular tweaks — so your site stays fast and current without you lifting a finger.

Every build ships with solid SEO foundations and Google Business Profile setup. Our Growth and Premium tiers go further with dedicated local-ranking work.

Your logo, a handful of photos of your work, and a short chat about your services. We take it from there.

We'll rebuild or refresh it. We review what you have and tell you honestly what's worth keeping — and what's holding you back.
